name: weave
description: Local-first relationship intelligence engine for macOS.
author: Weave

scripts.dev:electron: concurrently -k "npm:dev" "npm:dev:main" "npm:dev:preload" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 dist/main/main/index.js dist/preload/preload/index.js && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron ."
scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && vite build && npm run build:main && npm run build:preload
scripts.build:ocr: swiftc native/ocr/WeaveOCR.swift -framework AppKit -framework Vision -framework CoreGraphics -o native/ocr/weave-ocr
scripts.build:electron: node scripts/clean-release.js && npm run build && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --mac dmg --publish=never
scripts.dmg: npm run build:ocr && npm run build:contacts && npm run build:electron
scripts.beta:check: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build && npm run build:ocr && npm run build:contacts
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.main.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.preload.json
